tasks.title: Run all project tests and identify failures
tasks.description: Run the complete test suite using Vitest. Execute 'npm test' or 'npx vitest run' to run all test files. Report which tests pass and which fail, including error messages and stack traces for any failures.
acceptance_criteria: Any failures are documented with error details

tasks.title: Fix failing tests
tasks.description: Based on the test failures identified in QA-001, fix any failing tests. Read the failing test files and the corresponding source files they test. Common issues to check: missing imports, incorrect component structure, async/await issues, mock setup problems, DOM queries that don't match rendered output. Update test files or source code as needed to make tests pass while maintaining test integrity.
acceptance_criteria: All previously failing tests now pass
No existing passing tests are broken
Test fixes maintain proper test coverage

tasks.title: Verify all tests pass
tasks.description: Run the complete test suite again using 'npm test' or 'npx vitest run' to verify all tests now pass. Confirm zero test failures.
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass with no failures
